meta.name: OpenCode MCP Servers Collection
meta.description: Complete collection of 15 MCP servers for AI agent tool integration

aws.description: AWS EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, IAM, CloudFormation, and CloudWatch management

burp.description: Burp Suite Professional REST API for web security scanning

cve.description: CVE/NVD vulnerability database search, CVSS metrics, exploit lookup

database.description: Multi-DB query execution (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite) with transaction support

docker.description: Docker container management: run, exec, logs, build, compose, networks, volumes

filesystem.description: Secure file read/write, directory operations, glob search, content search

github.description: GitHub API: repos, issues, pull requests, commits, actions, search

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes cluster management: pods, services, deployments, logs, exec, configmaps, secrets

notion.description: Notion workspace integration: pages, databases, search, blocks

search.description: Web search, page fetch with CSS extraction, and content scraping

shodan.description: Shodan internet scanning + Censys host/certificate search

simple-chat.description: Unified messaging: send to WhatsApp, Telegram, and Slack from one tool

slack.description: Slack messaging: send messages, DMs, create channels, upload files, reactions

telegram.description: Telegram bot: send messages, photos, documents, inline keyboards, manage groups

terminal.description: Shell command execution, script running, background processes, grep, find

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp/Twilio Business API: send messages, media, templates
